description:
You are the course coordinator for CHEM201 Organic Chemistry I at State University. Reconfigure the gradebook to match the official syllabus requirements using 'Weighted mean of grades' as the top-level aggregation method. Organize the grade items into the following weighted categories:
- 'Problem Sets' (30%): contains Problem Set 1 and Problem Set 2
- 'Lab Reports' (30%): contains Lab Report 1 and Lab Report 2
- 'Exams' (40%): contains Midterm Exam (40% weight within category) and Final Exam (60% weight within category)
Login: admin / Admin1234!
